title: Top of the South 0.15m Flood Aerial Photos (2022)
description: Orthophotography in the Nelson, Tasman and Marlborough regions captured in August 2022 and September 2022 in response to a weather event.

providers.name: Toitū Te Whenua Land Information New Zealand

capture_area.title: Capture area
